title: New Station: Delhi IGI Airport T3 EV
description: Tata Power EZ Charge commissioned 10 chargers at IGI Airport T3 Parking with CCS2, Type-2 and Tesla-compatible connectors.

title: New Station: Noida Expressway Mahamaya Flyover
description: 6 chargers operational with 120kW ultra-fast and DC fast charging.

title: New Station: Gurgaon Golf Course Ext Road
New Station: Mumbai Juhu Beach EV
description: Magenta Power adds 4 chargers at Juhu Beach area.

title: New Station: Surat Dumas Road EV
description: ChargeZone expands to Surat with 5 chargers.

title: New Station: Trivandrum Technopark EV
description: Tata Power EZ Charge adds 6 chargers at Technopark.

title: New Station: Thane Viviana Mall EV
description: 6 chargers now operational at Viviana Mall including Tesla-compatible.

title: New Station: Navi Mumbai Seawoods EV
description: Zeon Charging opens 5-charger hub at Seawoods Grand Central.

title: New Station: Coimbatore Avinashi Road EV
description: Tata Power EZ Charge expands Tamil Nadu footprint.

title: New Station: Jaipur Ajmer Highway EV
description: Indian Oil EV installs 4 chargers on NH8 highway corridor.

title: Nehru Place EV Station Under Maintenance
description: Magenta Power station at Nehru Place is temporarily under maintenance. Expected to resume in 3 days.

title: NH44 Kurnool-Hyderabad Gap Alert
description: 200km stretch between Kurnool and Hyderabad has limited 24x7 fast charging. Only 2 stations found.

title: Leh-Manali Highway: No Charging Infrastructure
description: The 474km Leh-Manali Highway has zero EV charging stations. Not recommended for EV travel.

title: Tata Power EZ Charge Expands to Surat
description: Tata Power commissioned 5 new chargers in Surat, marking entry into Gujarat tier-2 market.

title: FAME III Policy Expected Q3 2026
description: Government of India expected to announce FAME III scheme with increased subsidies for charging infrastructure in rural and highway corridors.

title: New Station: Ghaziabad Vaishali EV
description: ChargeZone adds 4 chargers at Vaishali Metro Station with 120kW ultra-fast.

title: New Station: Faridabad Sector 15 EV
description: Statiq launches in Faridabad with 3 chargers.
